findings.finding: Missing capability: Athena TRACKED_FIELDS change detection uses empty-check instead of deep-equality, causing verification rewrites to be invisible to postmortems
findings.remediation: Replace `if (!legacyValue || legacyValue.length === 0)` with deep-equality check in athena_reviewer.ts:2074-2080 so prose→executable rewrites are counted as legacyCorrections

findings.finding: Missing capability: Governance gate tokens in Athena corrections[] are advisory-only — orchestrator does not parse them into dispatchBlockReason
findings.remediation: Add evaluatePreDispatchGovernanceGate() token parser: scan corrections[] for known gate tokens (rolling_yield_throttle, autonomy_execution_gate_not_ready) and set dispatchBlockReason if found

findings.finding: Missing capability: Lane diversity gate fires after waves have already dispatched, allowing monocultural worker execution before enforcement
findings.remediation: Move lane_diversity_gate check to pre-wave-1 validation (before first dispatch) and set dispatchBlockReason='lane_diversity_insufficient' if minimum threshold not met

resolvedLineage.finding: Self-improvement flagged 3 critical lesson(s): CI on main has been broken for at least 3 consecutive commits (0ec5b75, f276e7a, 531bbc0) with no CI-fix worker successfully completing a fix. Every cycle that closes without merging a CI fix compounds debt. quality-worker and evolution-worker must be explicitly tasked with CI repair as wave 1 prior
resolvedLineage.remediation: Address critical lessons in next cycle planning

recentTraces.context: gateSource=pre_dispatch_gate reason=lane_diversity_gate_blocked:Only 1 lane(s) active, minimum is 2. Worker topology may be monocultural.

capabilityExecutionTraces.context: gateSource=pre_dispatch_gate reason=lane_diversity_gate_blocked:Only 1 lane(s) active, minimum is 2. Worker topology may be monocultural.
